# RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Target

**Enumeration**

Enumeration representing the target to open the URL in.

## Declaration

```swift
enum Target
```

## Accessing targets

- **RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Target.defaultBrowser**: Open using default browser.
- **RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Target.inApp(detent:)**: Open in-app.
- **RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Detent**: Enumeration that represents a height to apply when opening a URL.

## Accessing action properties

- **url**: URL to open.
- **target**: Target to use when opening URL.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
